title: Events
content: Events Anti-Chitta Walkathon, The RidgeShimla by NSS JUIT on 15th November 2025 Anti-Drugs Marathon Walkathon under the theme Nasha Mukt Abhiyan on 02-11-2025 Anti Drugs Pledge and Group Counselling on Drug menace on 01-11-2025 Anti Drugs Pledge and Group Counselling on Drug menace-2 on 01-11-2025 Anti Drugs Pledge and Group Counselling on Drug menace on 30-10-2025 Rally on Nasha Mukti (Drug Abuse Awareness) 02 October 2025 Group Conselling session on Drug menace and Anti Drugs Pledge, ADC JUIT, 23-09-2025 Group Conselling session on Drug menace and Anti Drugs Pledge, ADC JUIT, 21-08-2025 Group Conselling session on Drug menace and Anti Drugs Pledge, ADC JUIT, 18-08-2025 State-Level Event on the occasion of International Youth Day (IYD) to create awareness among the young generation about Anti-Drugs and AIDS control, at Hotel Peterhof, Shimla 12-08-2025 Orientation and Interaction session for 1st year students on Anxiety and Mental Health (Dr. Shalini Dadwal ) held on 21-07-2025
